positive: A dynamic and whimsical forest spirit figure, composed in a clean, stylized silhouette style, standing amidst oversized, glowing bioluminescent flora and oversized, stylized ferns. The figure should have flowing, ethereal elements like vines and leaves woven into its form. Composition is centered and vertical, emphasizing symmetry and strong negative space around the edges for apparel printing. Lighting is magical and vibrant, using deep indigo, electric teal, and lime green as primary colors, contrasted by deep matte blacks. Highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, clean lines, vector art quality, minimalist yet lush.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, signature, gradient fade, messy lines, photographic, realism, low contrast
